title: Principal Frontend Developer at CGI India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at CGI India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
CGI India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
